system.biography: Helga is a blood witch, centuries old but kept young by her dark magic. She appears as a striking woman in her 40s with long red hair and eyes that seem to glow with inner fire. She wears elaborate red robes and is always covered in blood—whether her own or others' is unclear. Helga guards the southern piece of the Compass Rose and rules the village of Rot through blood magic, maintaining a cult of mind-controlled servants. She started centuries ago as a guardian like Margareta, sworn to protect her piece of the Rose, but was corrupted by the power of blood magic. Now she's a tyrant who takes blood willingly given or forcibly taken to sustain her unnatural life. When OZena attempted to infiltrate Rot and steal the Compass piece, Helga captured her and prepared a blood sacrifice ritual for the next full moon. Helga sees herself as dispensing justice—OZena murdered Johanne and Margareta, so she must pay in blood. But Helga's centuries of cruelty have made her more monster than guardian. She can control blood itself, making wounds bleed more, turning blood into weapons, and even taking control of anyone with an open wound. If killed, she drains blood from nearby sources to regenerate, visibly aging each time. Her greatest weakness is the complete Infusion of Purity with elderberry—it negates her blood magic for one Scene, revealing her true ancient age.
descriptors: I am a blood witch, centuries old but kept young by magic
I guard the southern piece of the Compass Rose
I punish those who threaten my domain
My power comes from blood willingly given—or forcibly taken

gifts.name: Blood Magic
gifts.description: Helga is a master of blood magic with three primary abilities. **Blood Control:** Can manipulate any blood she can see—make wounds bleed more profusely (inflict 1 additional Wound), turn spilled blood into sharp projectiles, or create barriers of hardened blood. **Blood Puppet:** Once per Scene, take control of any creature with an open wound within 30 feet. Victim must make a Check against her OL to resist; if they fail, they're under her control for one Exchange. **Blood Healing:** Drain blood from nearby sources (servants, animals, pooled blood) to heal herself, restoring 1 Wound by completely draining one human servant.

gifts.name: Blood Witch
gifts.description: Helga has sustained her life for centuries through blood magic. When she would be reduced to 0 Wounds, she instead: drains blood from all nearby sources, regenerates 1 Wound immediately, ages visibly (gains wrinkles, gray hair, etc.), and can do this once per Scene. When killed permanently, Helga rapidly ages centuries in moments, crumbling to dust. **Vulnerability:** The complete Infusion of Purity (with elderberry) negates all blood magic for one Scene when splashed on her. Without her magic, she's just an ordinary (very old) woman.

agenda: Protect my piece of the Compass Rose
Maintain my cult and power base
Punish OZena for murdering my sister witches
system.notes: Helga won't negotiate unless: (1) the Hunters have evidence of Henkle's manipulation, (2) they use the Infusion of Purity to break her blood magic, or (3) they appeal to her original purpose as a guardian. If combat begins, she's incredibly powerful—controlling blood, taking over wounded opponents, and regenerating when killed. If her magic fails, she ages rapidly into a withered old woman. If spared and freed from blood magic's corruption, she may reveal important truths about Henkle's plans in Smaragd and the true purpose of the Compass Rose. Voice: Commanding and imperious with an ancient accent. Mannerisms: Gestures dramatically, blood swirls around her when angry.
